display_company: AO / Globe Life — Plus Lead Benefits
name: AO / Globe Life — Plus Lead Benefits
description: Inbound benefits enrollment call. Customer was sponsored by a friend or family member.

beginner.statement: What is this again? What's the benefit package?
I didn't get a text message.
How long is this going to take?

intermediate.statement: We already have life insurance through my job.

advanced.statement: I need to talk to my [sponsor_relationship] first before I do anything.
Look, I'm really busy right now. Can you just call me back some other time?
